title: Barricades
description: Classic wooden barricades to block off windows!
body:
# Barricades

Barricades is a lightweight mod that adds wooden barricades to the game. That's it, really.

* A 16-pack of barricades can be crafted by placing 2 planks diagonally next to each other in a crafting grid.

## Usage

Hold a **Barricade** and right click to a wall to place a barricade. Barricades are a unique type of entity as they do not take any sort of damage from vanilla/modded damage sources. A barricade has 5HP (if you don't know what that means, think of it like 5 hearts but you'll always deal one heart damage). When a barricade breaks, it will drop nothing.

Zombies can break barricades on any difficulty, and they will do it faster depending on the difficulty. Here is a detailed table:

| Difficulty | Cooldown           |
|------------|--------------------|
| Peaceful   | N/A                |
| Easy       | 20 ticks (1sec)    |
| Normal     | 15 ticks (0.75sec) |
| Hard       | 10 ticks (0.5sec)  |

# License

This mod's source code is available on GitHub under the [MIT License](https://github.com/efekos/Barricades/blob/master/LICENSE.txt).
